message:
feat(freeze): Add 11 more opcodes to emitCommonOpcode

Added dual-mode (trampoline/SSA) support for high-priority opcodes:

Global variable access:
- get_var, get_var_undef: Global variable lookup with exception handling

Exception handling:
- throw: Throw exception with proper error propagation
- catch: Push exception onto stack (now in emitCommonOpcode)

Array operations:
- put_array_el: Array element assignment with error handling
- get_length: Get array/string length

Closure stubs (frozen functions don't support closures):
- set_var_ref0/1/2/3: Discard closure variable sets
- nip_catch: Remove catch handler from stack

All opcodes now support both trampoline mode (frame->result + break)
and SSA mode (return), using the is_trampoline parameter.

Result: All functions in tail_recursive.js benchmark now freeze
successfully with no unsupported opcodes.
